headline: Airline stocks hit turbulence amid Mideast conflict: Latest news
summary: US airline stocks faced slight headwinds in Wednesday's trading session in response to the recent escalations between the US and Iran, compounded by the jolt in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F). Market Domination Overtime Host Josh Lipton is joined by Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Pras Subramanian for a chat about the latest headlines emerging from the airline industry today, including United Airlines' (UAL) new headphone rule and the airport lounge American Express (AXP) opened in Las Vegas. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

content.title: Airline stocks hit turbulence amid Mideast conflict: Latest news
content.description:
US airline stocks faced slight headwinds in Wednesday's trading session in response to the recent escalations between the US and Iran, compounded by the jolt in oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F).

Market Domination Overtime Host Josh Lipton is joined by Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Brooke DiPalma and Pras Subramanian for a chat about the latest headlines emerging from the airline industry today, including United Airlines' (UAL) new headphone rule and the airport lounge American Express (AXP) opened in Las Vegas.
